mainEntity.name: How long does it take to settle a construction injury claim in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Settlements usually happen after you reach Maximum Medical Improvement (MMI). This typically takes 6 to 18 months depending on the severity of the injury and whether the insurer disputes the claim.
